data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies choices for users to improve their decision-making process.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes the size and position of clickable objects to enhance usability.
data.technical_spec: Large Clickable Buttons, Optimized Touch Targets

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Leverages user familiarity by keeping consistent UI patterns.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items together to help users easily understand and find information.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focuses on key features that drive the majority of user engagement.
